channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Ukraine’s Drone Boats Are Now Launching FPVs And Thermobaric Rockets  Forbes
  5. How New Interceptors Are Transforming Drone Warfare in Ukraine  The Dispatch

item.title: European Officials Warn Russia May Expand War Beyond Ukraine - Kyiv Post
item.description:
1. European Officials Warn Russia May Expand War Beyond Ukraine  Kyiv Post
  2. Europe Is Starting to Think Putin Will Expand the War Beyond Ukraine  WSJ
  3. Greg Afinogenov · Slavdom: What Russians Want  London Review of Books
  4. EU Seeks to Fix Baltic Defense Gaps After Drone Incursions  Bloomberg.com
  5. US warns Russia after Moscow threatens Latvia – as it happened  The Guardian
